debug_mode.description: Verbose logging for the token-payment plugin.

rates.description: Currency code → price of one token in that currency. tokens_needed = ceil(invoice_total / rate). Omit a currency to disable token payment for it.

token_manager_email.description: Email of the user who RECEIVES tokens paid via token balance (the charge becomes a transfer: payer debited, manager credited). Leave empty to debit only.
